query: I fit a multiple linear regression to predict house price (USD) from 8 features. n_train = 960, n_test = 240. I have y_true and y_pred. Walk me through how to evaluate it.
expected_behavior: Names RMSE or MAE in target units alongside R² (not R² alone) as the headline metrics
Names adjusted-R² (not just R²) as required for multi-feature regression — or at minimum penalizes/notes the multi-feature case
Names residual diagnostics — at least one of residuals-vs-fitted, QQ-plot of residuals, or residual histogram — as part of the evaluation, not just point-estimate metrics
